ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., patient, caregiver, healthcare provider) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the profile belongs to */,
  "insulin_sensitivity" REAL /* Insulin sensitivity of the user */,
  "carb_ratio" REAL /* Carb ratio of the user */,
  "target_glucose_range" TEXT /* Target glucose range for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medical profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medical profile was last updated */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any other medical conditions the user has */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies the user has */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Past medical history of the user */,
  "physician_name" TEXT /* Name of the user's primary care physician */,
  "physician_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the user's primary care physician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "glucose_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each glucose reading */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the reading belongs to */,
  "glucose_level" REAL /* Blood glucose level reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the reading was taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the reading */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the reading (e.g., manual entry, CGM) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reading was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glucose_readings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insulin_dosages" (
  "dosage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insulin dosage */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the dosage belongs to */,
  "dosage_amount" REAL /* Amount of insulin administered */,
  "dosage_time" TEXT /* Time the dosage was administered */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the dosage */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dosage information (e.g., manual entry, device) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dosage was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dosage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insulin_dosages_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physical activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of physical activity (e.g., walking, running) */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the physical activity in minutes */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the physical activity (e.g., light, moderate, vigorous) */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Number of calories burned during the activity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physical_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meals_and_snacks" (
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal or snack */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the food belongs to */,
  "food_type" TEXT /* Type of food (e.g., breakfast, lunch, snack) */,
  "food_amount" REAL /* Amount of food consumed */,
  "meal_time" TEXT /* Time the meal or snack was consumed */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Number of calories in the meal or snack */,
  "carbs" INTEGER /* Number of carbohydrates in the meal or snack */,
  "fats" INTEGER /* Number of fats in the meal or snack */,
  "proteins" INTEGER /* Number of proteins in the meal or snack */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the meal or snack */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meal or snack was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meals_and_snacks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cgm_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CGM reading */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the reading belongs to */,
  "glucose_level" REAL /* CGM glucose level reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the reading was taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the CGM reading */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the CGM reading (e.g., specific device model) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CGM reading was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cgm_readings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_glucose_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the prediction belongs to */,
  "predicted_glucose_level" REAL /* Predicted blood glucose level */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Time the prediction was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction (e.g., algorithm used) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_glucose_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hypoglycemic_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the event belongs to */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time the event occurred */,
  "glucose_level" REAL /* Glucose level at the time of the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hypoglycemic_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperglycemic_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the event belongs to */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time the event occurred */,
  "glucose_level" REAL /* Glucose level at the time of the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperglycemic_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_data" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the device belongs to */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., wearable, CGM) */,
  "device_data" TEXT /* Data from the device */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Battery level of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "last_sync_time" TEXT /* Last time the device was synchronized */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the setting belongs to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., hypoglycemic, hyperglycemic) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "alert_method" TEXT /* Method of the alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time the log entry was made */,
  "log_entry" TEXT /* Log entry details */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., login, logout, read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
